complaint_text: My order KM-1001 arrived with a broken screen. Please help me get a refund.

context.notes: Order KM-1001 found for Aisyah. Item: Bluetooth Speaker (MYR 129.0). Status: DELIVERED on 2026-04-20. Issue: damaged_item. Sentiment: negative.

reasoning.rationale: Order was delivered and the customer reported a damaged item (broken screen), explicitly requesting a refund.

response.english: Dear Aisyah, we are so sorry to hear that your Bluetooth Speaker arrived with a broken screen. We understand how frustrating this must be. To make things right, we have approved a full refund of MYR 129.0 for your order (KM-1001). You can expect the funds to be processed back to your original payment method shortly. Thank you for your patience and understanding.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Salam Aisyah, kami amat kesal kerana Speaker Bluetooth anda tiba dengan skrin yang pecah. Kami faham betapa kecewanya situasi ini. Sebagai penyelesaian, kami telah meluluskan bayaran balik penuh sebanyak MYR 129.0 untuk pesanan anda (KM-1001). Anda boleh menjangkakan wang tersebut akan diproses kembali ke kaedah pembayaran asal anda tidak lama lagi. Terima kasih atas kesabaran dan kefahaman anda.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Automated refund approved for damaged item. High confidence decision based on delivered order and valid complaint.

complaint_text: Hi, I want a refund for order ORD-1912. The shoes fit fine and there is nothing wrong with them, but I changed my mind after using them for 45 days.

context.notes: Customer Farah is requesting a refund for DELIVERED order ORD-1912 (Running Shoes - Black 42, 159.0 MYR). Item delivered on 2026-03-18.

reasoning.rationale: Change-of-mind refund request is outside the seller refund window and no damage or fulfillment issue is claimed.

response.english: Dear Farah, Thank you for reaching out regarding your order ORD-1912. We understand that you have changed your mind about the Running Shoes. However, we are unable to process a refund as our seller's return policy covers change-of-mind requests within 30 days of delivery, and your order was delivered 45 days ago. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Kehadapan Farah, Terima kasih kerana menghubungi kami mengenai pesanan anda ORD-1912. Kami faham bahawa anda telah berubah hati mengenai kasut Running tersebut. Walau bagaimanapun, kami tidak dapat memproses bayaran balik kerana dasar pemulangan penjual kami hanya merangkumi permintaan berubah hati dalam tempoh 30 hari selepas penghantaran, dan pesanan anda telah dihantar 45 hari yang lalu. Kami memohon maaf atas sebarang kesulitan ini dan menghargai kefahaman anda.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Automated dismissal confirmed. High confidence decision based on policy (change-of-mind outside 30-day refund window).

complaint_text: Hi, I ordered KM-1003 Gaming Mouse but received the wrong item in the parcel. Please arrange a replacement with the correct item.

context.notes: Customer received the wrong item. Order KM-1003 for a Gaming Mouse was delivered on 2026-04-19. Customer sentiment is negative.

reasoning.rationale: Customer received the wrong item and explicitly requested a replacement for the correct Gaming Mouse.

response.english: Dear Nurul, I am so sorry to hear that you received the wrong item in your parcel. We sincerely apologize for this mistake. As requested, we are arranging a reshipment of the correct KM-1003 Gaming Mouse to you right away. You will receive an email with the new tracking details shortly. Thank you for your patience and understanding.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Kehadapan Nurul, saya amat kesal kerana anda menerima barang yang salah dalam pesanan anda. Kami memohon maaf atas kesilapan ini. Atas permintaan anda, kami akan mengatur penghantaran semula Gaming Mouse KM-1003 yang betul dengan segera. Anda akan menerima e-mel yang mengandungi maklumat penjejakan baru tidak lama lagi. Terima kasih atas kesabaran dan kefahaman anda.

supervisor.supervisor_note: High-confidence decision to reship the correct Gaming Mouse for order KM-1003. No human intervention required.

context.notes: No order ID provided; order lookup returned null.

reasoning.rationale: Customer claims item is damaged and requests a refund, but no order ID or customer name was provided and the order lookup failed.

response.english: We are so sorry to hear that your item arrived damaged. We want to resolve this and process your request as quickly as possible, but we need a few more details. We have escalated your case to our customer support team, who will reach out to you shortly to help verify your order and assist you with the refund.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Kita amat kesal mendengar bahawa barang anda telah rosak. Kami ingin menyelesaikan dan memproses permintaan anda secepat mungkin, tetapi kami memerlukan butiran lanjut. Kami telah menaiktaraf kes anda kepada pasukan sokongan pelanggan kami, dan mereka akan menghubungi anda tidak lama lagi untuk membantu mengesahkan pesanan dan membantu anda dengan proses bayaran balik.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Automated escalation with high confidence (0.95). Order lookup failed due to missing details (no order ID or customer name provided). Manual intervention required to locate the order and process the damage/refund claim.

complaint_text: Hi team, saya punya order ORD-2041 dah dua minggu still tak sampai. Tracking stuck dekat KUL Hub, no movement at all. Kalau tak boleh settle today, saya nak refund ya.

context.notes: Order found for Aina. Issue: delivery_delay. Status: SHIPPED. No delivery date assigned. Negative sentiment.

reasoning.rationale: Tracking is stuck and has been delayed for two weeks. The customer has explicitly threatened to request a refund if the issue is not resolved today. This requires manual intervention to investigate the carrier discrepancy and fulfill the customer's urgent ultimatum accurately.

response.english: Hi Aina, I am so sorry that your Baju Kurung Moden has been delayed for two weeks. I understand how frustrating it is that the tracking is stuck. I have escalated your order (ORD-2041) to our dedicated support team right now. They will investigate this immediately and follow up with you today to ensure it is resolved or to process a refund for you.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Hi Aina, saya amat minta maaf kerana Baju Kurung Moden anda telah tertangguh selama dua minggu. Saya faham betapa cynya apabila tracking stuck. Saya telah menaik taraf (escalate) order anda (ORD-2041) kepada pasukan sokongan khas kami sekarang. Mereka akan siasat serta hubungi anda hari ini untuk menyelesaikan masalah ini atau memproses bayaran balik (refund) buat anda.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Immediate attention required: Customer issued a refund ultimatum today due to a 2-week shipping delay with stuck tracking. Investigate carrier discrepancy and contact customer to prevent chargeback.
